mapper.sql: scope_type = #{scopeType} AND ((scope_id IS NULL AND #{scopeId} IS NULL) OR scope_id = #{scopeId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_graph_runs ( id, scope_type, scope_id, status, model_config_id, prompt_version, total_chunk_count, processed_chunk_count, skipped_chunk_count, extracted_node_count, extracted_edge_count, failed_chunk_count, error_message, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{scopeType}, #{scopeId}, #{status}, #{modelConfigId}, #{promptVersion}, #{totalChunkCount}, #{processedChunkCount}, #{skippedChunkCount}, #{extractedNodeCount}, #{extractedEdgeCount}, #{failedChunkCount}, #{errorMessage}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM knowledge_graph_runs WHERE AND status IN ('QUEUED', 'RUNNING') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM knowledge_graph_runs WHERE ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT scope_type, scope_id, MAX(CASE WHEN view_type = 'MINDMAP' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS mindmap_ready, MAX(CASE WHEN view_type = 'GRAPH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS graph_ready, MAX(updated_at) AS generated_at FROM knowledge_graph_views GROUP BY scope_type, scope_id ORDER BY generated_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_graph_runs SET status = 'COMPLETED', extracted_node_count = #{extractedNodeCount}, extracted_edge_count = #{extractedEdgeCount}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE knowledge_graph_runs SET status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE status IN ('QUEUED', 'RUNNING')
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM knowledge_graph_chunk_extractions WHERE chunk_id IN
#{chunkId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_graph_chunk_extractions ( chunk_id, document_id, content_hash, prompt_version, model_config_id, status, extraction_json, error_message, extracted_at ) VALUES ( #{chunkId}, #{documentId}, #{contentHash}, #{promptVersion}, #{modelConfigId}, #{status}, #{extractionJson}, #{errorMessage}, #{extractedAt} ) ON CONFLICT(chunk_id) DO UPDATE SET document_id = excluded.document_id, content_hash = excluded.content_hash, prompt_version = excluded.prompt_version, model_config_id = excluded.model_config_id, status = excluded.status, extraction_json = excluded.extraction_json, error_message = excluded.error_message, extracted_at = excluded.extracted_at
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM knowledge_graph_chunk_extractions WHERE chunk_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM chunks)
DELETE FROM knowledge_graph_chunk_extractions WHERE chunk_id IN ( SELECT c.id FROM chunks c JOIN documents d ON d.id = c.document_id WHERE d.knowledge_folder_id = #{knowledgeFolderId} )

DELETE FROM knowledge_graph_evidence WHERE node_id IN ( SELECT id FROM knowledge_graph_nodes WHERE ) OR edge_id IN ( SELECT id FROM knowledge_graph_edges WHERE ) OR run_id IN ( SELECT id FROM knowledge_graph_runs WHERE )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM knowledge_graph_nodes WHERE ORDER BY mention_count DESC, display_name ASC
SELECT * FROM knowledge_graph_edges WHERE ORDER BY mention_count DESC, relation_type ASC, display_label ASC
SELECT * FROM knowledge_graph_views WHERE AND view_type = #{viewType} ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.sql: e.id, e.run_id, e.node_id, e.edge_id, e.document_id, e.chunk_id, e.quote, e.confidence, e.created_at, d.file_name, d.source_path, c.heading, c.page_number, c.chunk_index, n.display_name AS node_display_name, n.node_type, edge.relation_type AS edge_relation_type, source_node.display_name AS edge_source_name, target_node.display_name AS edge_target_name

FROM knowledge_graph_evidence e JOIN chunks c ON c.id = e.chunk_id JOIN documents d ON d.id = e.document_id LEFT JOIN knowledge_graph_nodes n ON n.id = e.node_id LEFT JOIN knowledge_graph_edges edge ON edge.id = e.edge_id LEFT JOIN knowledge_graph_nodes source_node ON source_node.id = edge.source_node_id LEFT JOIN knowledge_graph_nodes target_node ON target_node.id = edge.target_node_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE n.scope_type = #{scopeType} AND ((n.scope_id IS NULL AND #{scopeId} IS NULL) OR n.scope_id = #{scopeId}) ORDER BY d.file_name ASC, c.chunk_index ASC, n.mention_count DESC
